name: Migrate Python ML Agents to Pydantic V2
desc: Update all Python data models to replace deprecated .dict() calls with .model_dump() to silence deprecation warnings and align with Long-814 Spec.

name: Update Ollama Model Handling
desc: Correct startup event logic to use models['models'] instead of the deprecated models.get('models') during Ollama agent initialization.

name: Refactor God Class: site-generator.js
desc: Deconstruct the 91KB site-generator.js file into smaller, granular, template-specific modules to resolve architectural sprawl.

name: Refactor God Class: heady-manager.js
desc: Deconstruct the 90KB heady-manager.js file into strictly separated routing, middleware, node orchestration, and health monitoring layers.

name: Consolidate Configuration Directories
desc: Merge any remaining config/ files into the unified configs/ directory to enforce pentagonal architecture constraints.

name: Enforce Canonical Build Scripts
desc: Identify and run the single canonical hc-build.ps1. Delete obsolete redundant variants (hcautobuild.ps1, etc.) from tracking.

name: Execute Package Manager Standardization
desc: Delete package-lock.json to avoid dependency resolution conflicts. Strictly enforce pnpm and pnpm-lock.yaml across all environments.

name: Align Semantic Versioning Matrix
desc: Synchronize package.json (v2.1.0), .env files (v2.0.0), and documentation (v3.0.0+) into a single continuous v3.0.0 designated in heady-registry.json.

name: Deploy Native SAST Integration
desc: Trigger and monitor Github Advanced Security and Semgrep/CodeQL actions to ensure zero-day auditing on all pipeline code deployments.

name: Continuous Quantum Bridge Health Check
desc: Regularly connect to the secure /quantum-bridge/{session_id} WebSocket to verify live archetype consultations are active and responsive.

name: Generate 3D Visual Metadata Maps
desc: Initiate background simulations using the Chaos Factor to generate novel 'Sacred Geometry' Pentagonal Pattern visualizations.

name: Decentralized Human Unique ID Sync
desc: Periodically poll HUID endpoints to verify Sybil-resistant decentralized governance compliance is maintained for all active operators.
